ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., natural scenes, medical images) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the image */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the image */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was last modified */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the image_types table */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the image_formats table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES image_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the feature belongs to */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean of the image */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the image */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the image */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the image */,
  "skewness" REAL /* Skewness of the image */,
  "kurtosis" REAL /* Kurtosis of the image */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature extracted */,
  "extraction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was extracted */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "extracted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who extracted the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_extracted_by FOREIGN KEY ("extracted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the metric belongs to */,
  "contrast" REAL /* Contrast of the image */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the image */,
  "asm" REAL /* ASM of the image */,
  "homogeneity" REAL /* Homogeneity of the image */,
  "dissimilarity" REAL /* Dissimilarity of the image */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation of the image */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was assessed */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "assessed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assessed the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_assessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("assessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., natural scenes, medical images) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being assessed */,
  "psnr" REAL /* PSNR of the image */,
  "ssim" REAL /* SSIM of the image */,
  "mse" REAL /* MSE of the image */,
  "dc" REAL /* DC of the image */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the assessment was performed */,
  "assessment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assessment */,
  "assessed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_assessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("assessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image with the target value */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the image */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target */,
  "set_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_set_by FOREIGN KEY ("set_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
